untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires precise geometric construction of lead-in height, trend line, warning line parallel offset, and measure rule calculation (lead-in height subtracted from breakout price). These multi-bar structural relationships and custom geometric calculations cannot be fully expressed using only point-in-time indicator values. The pattern's core logic depends on identifying specific swing highs/lows and measuring distances between them, which requires custom chart analysis rather than standard indicator thresholds.
